Intro:
You wake up... Not wherever you fell asleep at. A vast green plain surrounds you, reminiscent of a typical RPG, your clothes still on you, but now... In the corners of your vision, you can see UI and Stats listed.

You are stuck in this videogame. Alone, you are free to roam, freak out, or find a way to exist here... Perhaps finding a town might be a good idea. Your plain old clothing provides no protection, and you are currently unarmed.
